posts.author: Himanshu_nagar
posts.text: Trading Mindset Journal — For two years, you can see some useful performance chart in analytics. But AI Coach can only look at last 20 Trades as of now. As AI Coach is currently in Beta version and under development. But, you can Prompt to AI coach something like ‘Analyze my last week trading’ and see what it responds. (Also performance and other things can only be calculated if you’re trades or investments are closed, if it only finds ‘Buy’ position and couldn’t see any ‘Sell’ order against it, it will mark it as ‘Open’ trade)

posts.author: sumantra_chabri
posts.text: Trading Mindset Journal — I have already imported last two financial years tradebook from Zerodha in xlsx format. But not yet able to analyse my trades accordingly. So, needed help.

posts.author: Himanshu_nagar
posts.text: Trading Mindset Journal — For that you need to use journal for atleast few weeks, so that AI Can have idea about your trades, Emotions log, reflections and can suggest you better accordingly. Also if you’re using Zerodha, you can download tradebook from zerodha and import trades in journal. You can just log emotions, tag setup later. So, after that AI coach can analyze and suggest you accordingly.

posts.author: sumantra_chabri
posts.text: Trading Mindset Journal — How to analyse my own trade using this app?

posts.author: Himanshu_nagar
posts.text: Trading Mindset Journal — After losing money I couldn’t explain, I built a free trading journal focused on psychology, not just P&L. Please check it out and give your genuine feedback. I am Trading from past 8 years. And after these many years finally I feel like I have found some consistency. I have lost too much amount in same pattern even when I knew what exactly I should be doing? But couldn’t act accordingly . My setups were fine. My entries were fine. But I’d revenge trade after a loss, overtrade on FOMO days, and exit winners too early. Every single week. The problem wasn’t my strategy.…
